etymology.description: č‰ą(č‰ą) (cÇŽo, "grass") + phonetic: äşĄ(äşĄ) (hĂ i, "twelfth earthly branch") = plant roots
etymology.interpretation: The character čŤ„ combines č‰ą(č‰ą) (cÇŽo, "grass") as a semantic component to indicate a connection with plants, with äşĄ(äşĄ) (hĂ i) as the phonetic component to suggest pronunciation. Together, they convey the meaning of 'roots', emphasizing the plant-related aspect.
